profiles.name: Estes Alpha (Beginner Model Rocket)
profiles.desc: A tiny hobby rocket perfect for a first launch, reaching a few hundred feet.

profiles.name: Mid-Power Sounding Rocket
profiles.desc: Similar to hobbyist high-power rockets that can carry a small camera or sensor payload.

profiles.name: Advanced Sounding Rocket
profiles.desc: Comparable to research sounding rockets used to study the upper atmosphere.

profiles.name: Small Orbital Test Rocket
profiles.desc: Similar to early-stage orbital rocket prototypes built by student and startup teams.

profiles.name: Two-Stage Orbital Rocket
profiles.desc: Comparable to a small real orbital launch vehicle capable of reaching space.

profiles.name: Satellite-Class Orbital Rocket
profiles.desc: A well-equipped orbital rocket capable of carrying and powering a small satellite.
